+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "surrealdb-2054-feature-indexing-query-planner",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "surrealdb: Feature: Indexing & Query Planner",
+    "description": "Feature: Indexing & Query Planner. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current surrealdb setup",
+        "description": "Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:\n```bash\nsurreal version\n```\nThis feature requires a working surrealdb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nSurrealDB is a database. Together, indexes and query planners are the typical techniques used to speed up the execution of queries."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Indexing & Query Planner",
+        "description": "## What is the motivation?\n\nThis will enable users to index and search documents using full-text capabilities.\n\n## What does this change do?\n\nThis PR implements the indexing part.\n\nThis is the main TDD test:\n\nhttps://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/blob/f7bdd078f15e1e7a1a335af9cbe50a40f1f33c31/lib/tests/define.rs#L964-L973\n\nThis SQL script do the following:\n- creates two documents\n- create an index, triggering the indexing of both documents\n- create a third document, indexed synchronously.\n-\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Indexing & Query Planner\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## What is the motivation?\n\nThis will enable users to index and search documents using full-text capabilities.\n\n## What does this change do?\n\nThis PR implements the indexing part.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "surrealdb",
+      "community",
+      "multi-model-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "surrealdb"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/issues/2054",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/pull/1779"
+    },
+    "reactions": 12,
+    "comments": 0,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "surreal"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working surrealdb installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T07:06:03.835Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+}
